commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc "pm2 jlist" | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d||'[]');const p=j.find(x=>x.name==='mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge');console.log('PM2_STATUS='+(p?p.pm2_env.status:'missing'));console.log('PM2_RESTARTS='+(p?p.pm2_env.restart_time:'n/a'));});"

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs/mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out.log')
print('LOG_EXISTS=' + str(p.exists()).lower())
if p.exists():
    for line in p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()[-12:]:
        print(line.encode('ascii', 'ignore').decode())
PY
